data.name: Project: Mirror 2
data.detailed_description:
DESCRIPTION




Project: Mirror 2 is an erotic fantasy game featuring beautiful girls, a relaxing atmosphere, and engaging match-3 gameplay. You will discover over 99 new images, improved graphics, and a variety of effects that make every round bright and enjoyable.

99 hot girls are waiting for you!



If you want to unwind after a long day, Project: Mirror 2 offers a light, beautiful, and relaxing experience. Match crystals, pass levels, unlock the Gallery with charming heroines, and enjoy high-quality music. With each level, the game becomes richer: new improvements, new challenges, more visual beauty, and more satisfaction from progression.

Game Features:

  • Beautiful match-3 gameplay.
  • Over 99 illustrations of girls unlocking as you progress.
  • Vivid visual effects and improved graphics.
  • Relaxing music.
  • Achievement system to decorate your Steam profile.
  • Ability to skip any level with one click.
  • Fantasy atmosphere and light erotic content.

data.short_description: Project: Mirror 2 is the continuation of a popular erotic fantasy match-3 series with vibrant effects, relaxing music, and over 99 beautiful girl illustrations. Dive into a game you won’t be able to put down.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 11 (64 bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 10)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 11 (64 bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 12)

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WINDOWS® 11 (64 bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5 Serise or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 10)
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WINDOWS® 11 (64 bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5 Serise or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 12)
